title: Simple Guns: Reworked
description: New Weapons made with Vanilla materials
body:
![weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ebd0196d44781d2f5b0a465210cec8d14f4e23c_0.webp)


## **Simple guns: Reworked**
Adds a plenty of new weapons made from vanilla materials.
All of them are crafted in a crafting table and require mostly iron.
For the Bullets, mostly iron and gold, and of course gunpowder.
All the weapons needs to be **loaded before shooting**, having diferent **Ammo storages**.

 
![weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ce2db360767f392b5905b76260cf5ffd1ebf5e4.png)

** Most of the info of each weapon comes on their description**
 
![details](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1aa42d42a45fdf6aa4e45710f5589e0a673e9860.png)
